nl: Write a model to find an integer x that is strictly greater than 5. Satisfy the constraints.
Find an integer y that is exactly equal to 10.
Declare an integer z between 1 and 100. Constrain z to be less than 50 and satisfy.
Create a model with an integer a from 0 to 10, where a is not equal to 3.
Find an integer b that is greater than or equal to 20.
Declare an integer x from 1 to 5. Constrain x to be less than or equal to 4 and satisfy.
Model a problem to find a boolean variable a that must be true.
Declare two boolean variables a and b. Constrain that both a and b are true.
Find two boolean variables, x and y, such that either x or y is true.
Declare booleans c and d. Constrain that c implies d.
Write a model with two integers x and y. Constrain their sum to be exactly 15.
Find integers a and b where a minus b is greater than 10.
Declare integers x and y between 1 and 10. Constrain x multiplied by y to be 24.
Find two integers a and b such that a divided by b equals 4.
Model an integer x from 1 to 20 where x modulo 2 equals 0 (x is even).
Find an integer y from 1 to 100 where y modulo 5 is equal to 3.
Declare two integers x and y. Constrain x + y to be less than or equal to 50.
Find integers a and b such that a * b is greater than or equal to 100.
Write a model with integers x and y from 0 to 10. Constrain x - y to not equal 0.
Declare integers a and b. Ensure that a mod b is strictly less than 2.
Find an array arr of 5 integers from 1 to 10. Constrain the sum of arr to be exactly 25.
Declare an array nums of 3 integers from 0 to 5. Constrain their sum to be greater than 10.
Create a model with an array arr of 4 integers from 1 to 3. The sum of arr must be less than 8.
Find an array nums of 10 boolean variables. The sum of nums must exactly equal 5.
Declare an array arr of 2 integers from 10 to 20. Ensure the sum of arr is not equal to 30.
Model a set s containing values from 1 to 10, and an integer x. Constrain x to be in s.
Declare a set s from 0 to 5 and an integer y from 1 to 5. Constrain y to be in s.
Find an integer z and a set s of 1 to 100. Constrain that z is in s.
Declare a boolean b and an integer x. Constrain that if b is true, x must be exactly 10.
Model a boolean a and an integer y from 1 to 5. If a is true, y must be greater than 3.
Find an integer x from 1 to 10. Maximize the value of x.
Declare an integer y from 0 to 50. Constrain y to be less than 40 and maximize y.
Model two integers a and b from 1 to 10. Constrain a + b <= 15 and maximize a.
Find an array arr of 3 integers from 1 to 5. Constrain the sum of arr to be less than 10, and maximize arr.
Declare an integer x from 10 to 20. Minimize the value of x.
Find an integer z from 1 to 100. Constrain z modulo 10 to be 0 and minimize z.
Declare integers x and y from 5 to 15. Constrain x - y == 2 and minimize x.
Model a problem to find an integer x that is equal to 8, and output x.
Find an integer y from 1 to 10, constrain y > 5, solve satisfy, and output y.
Declare an array arr of 4 integers from 0 to 2. Constrain the sum to equal 4 and output arr.
Find an integer a strictly greater than 100 and satisfy the constraints.
Declare a variable x from 1 to 3 and constrain x to not equal 2.
Find two integers x and y. Constrain x * y <= 50 and maximize x.
Declare an array nums of 5 boolean variables. Constrain the sum of nums to be greater than 2.
Model a boolean b and an integer z from 1 to 10. If b is true, z must be exactly 5. Maximize z.
Find an integer x from 0 to 100 where x mod 3 == 1. Minimize x and output x.
Declare a set s from 1 to 20 and an integer y. Constrain y to be in s and minimize y.
Write a model with an integer x and an integer y. Constrain x / y == 2 and satisfy.
Find a boolean a and a boolean c. Constrain that a and c are both true, and output a.
Declare two integers a and b from 1 to 5. Constrain a - b < 0 and maximize a.
Model an array arr of 10 integers from 0 to 1. The sum of arr must be exactly 7. Output arr.
Declare integer x from 10 to 50. Constrain x mod 4 == 0. Minimize x.
Find boolean x and boolean y. Constrain that x implies y, and satisfy.
Declare an integer z from 1 to 10. Constrain z >= 5. Output z.
Create a model with an integer a from 1 to 100. Constrain a == 99. Maximize a.
Find integers x and y. Constrain x + y > 10. Minimize y.
Declare an array nums of 2 integers from 5 to 15. Constrain the sum to be less than 20.
Model an integer x. Constrain x < 0. Satisfy the constraints.
Find a set s from 0 to 10 and integer x. Constrain x in s. Maximize x.
Declare integer y from 1 to 10. Constrain y != 7. Output y.
Write a model with booleans a and b. Constrain either a or b. Output a.
Find integers x and y from 0 to 5. Constrain x * y == 12.
Declare an array arr of 3 booleans. Constrain the sum of arr to be exactly 1. Minimize arr.
Model an integer z from 1 to 20. Constrain z mod 2 != 0. Satisfy constraints.
Find two integers a and b. Constrain a / b >= 2. Maximize a.
Declare a boolean b and integer x from 1 to 10. If b is true, x < 5.
Create a model with integer y from 10 to 30. Constrain y <= 15. Maximize y and output y.
Find a set s from 1 to 5 and an integer x. Constrain x in s. Output x.
Declare integers x and y from 1 to 10. Constrain x + y == 20. Output x.
Model an array nums of 5 integers from 1 to 2. Constrain sum of nums == 8.
Find an integer a strictly less than 10. Satisfy the model.
Declare boolean x and boolean y. Constrain that x and y are true. Maximize x.
Write a model with an integer z from 1 to 100. Constrain z mod 7 == 0. Minimize z.
Find two integers a and b from 1 to 20. Constrain a - b == 10. Output a.
Declare an array arr of 10 booleans. Constrain the sum to be less than 5.
Model an integer y from 1 to 10. Constrain y == 5. Minimize y and output y.
Find a boolean b and integer x from 0 to 5. Constrain b implies x == 0.
Declare a set s from 1 to 3 and integer a. Constrain a in s. Maximize a.
Create a model with integers x and y. Constrain x * y > 20. Minimize x.
Find an integer a from 1 to 5. Constrain a != 1. Output a.
Declare two integers x and y from 1 to 10. Constrain x / y <= 1.
Model an array nums of 4 integers from 1 to 10. Constrain sum of nums >= 30.
Find an integer z from 1 to 50. Constrain z mod 5 != 0. Maximize z.
Declare booleans a and b. Constrain either a or b. Output b.
Write a model with an integer x. Constrain x >= 100. Minimize x.
Find a set s from 10 to 20 and integer y. Constrain y in s. Output y.
Declare integers a and b from 0 to 10. Constrain a + b == 5. Maximize a.
Model a boolean c and an integer x from 1 to 10. Constrain c implies x > 8.
Find an array arr of 5 booleans. Constrain the sum of arr to equal 0. Output arr.
Declare an integer z from 1 to 10. Constrain z < 5. Maximize z and output z.
Create a model with integers x and y. Constrain x - y != 0. Minimize y.
Find an integer a from 1 to 100. Constrain a mod 10 == 9. Maximize a.
Declare two booleans x and y. Constrain x implies y. Maximize y.
Model a set s from 1 to 10 and integer z. Constrain z in s. Minimize z.
Find an array nums of 3 integers from 1 to 5. Constrain sum of nums == 15.
Declare integers a and b from 1 to 10. Constrain a * b == 9. Output a.
Write a model with an integer x from 0 to 20. Constrain x > 15. Maximize x.
Find booleans a and c. Constrain both a and c. Output c.

Model two integers x and y. Constrain x / y < 5. Satisfy constraints.
